identity.name: Sourabh Bhaumik
identity.headline: Founder & CEO | IT Services, Field Operations & AI Transformation
headline_alternates: Founder & Managing Director | IT Services, System Integration & AI Transformation
Serial Entrepreneur | Technology & Field-Operations Leader | AI Generalist
Founder | AI Transformation, POS & E-Governance Delivery at Scale

summary.short: Kolkata founder who grew an IT services and field-operations firm past ₹10 crore and now spends his time getting AI into traditional service businesses.
summary.long: Founder of Ultimate Digital Solutions, a Kolkata firm that grew past ₹10 crore keeping POS networks, data centres and government e-governance projects running across India. Fifteen years before that were spent selling telecom and IT for Aircel, Reliance and HCL. These days most of his attention goes to a plain question — where can AI actually take the manual work out of field operations that still run on spreadsheets and phone calls.

career_objective: To keep building companies that solve real, on-the-ground operational problems — the messy kind — using IT, AI and field teams.

current_roles.title: Founder & CEO / Managing Director
current_roles.industry: IT services · system integration · field operations · POS · data-centre O&M · e-governance
highlights: Grew UDS into a ₹10 crore company that runs IT systems, data centres and POS rollouts, plus large government digitisation work — often several of them for the same client.
Grew a ~150-strong field and technical delivery workforce and built pan-India operations across multiple Indian states.
Won and served 20+ enterprise and government clients, owning proposals, sales, pricing and strategic partnerships end to end.
Directed large-scale government-linked digitisation deployments mobilising 1,000+ field resources with SLA-bound execution.
Conceptualised 2 operational SaaS products — FieldConnect and PosBuddy — to digitise engineer tracking, stock movement and POS service management.
Leading AI-transformation planning to automate MIS, dispatch and support across 5+ service lines.

current_roles.title: Founder & Director
highlights: Founded a theatre and storytelling venture, directing and writing stage productions that blend classical theatre with contemporary narratives.

current_roles.title: Founder & Chairman
highlights: Founded a registered Section-8 non-profit (est. 2021) supporting youth education and development programmes.

current_roles.title: Founder & Director
highlights: Launched a human-assisted outstation cab service with phone/WhatsApp booking for families, patients and non-app users, emphasising driver welfare and passenger safety.

achievements: Founded and scaled Ultimate Digital Solutions to a ₹10 crore-plus turnover business within its early growth phase.
Built pan-India service capability across multiple Indian states with a ~150-person field and technical workforce.
Delivered government-linked digitisation programmes mobilising thousands of field resources under strict SLAs.
Won 20+ enterprise and government accounts across POS, data-centre O&M and e-governance.
Conceptualised FieldConnect and PosBuddy — SaaS products for field-operations and POS service management.
Launched three ventures and one registered non-profit across IT, mobility, creative production and social impact.
Scored 84% in the SAP ABAP certification (2008) — cited as one of the highest in India at the time.
Summited Annapurna Base Camp (4,130 m) in October 2023.

certifications.name: SAP Certified Consultant — ABAP
certifications.note: Cited as one of the highest scores in India at the time

awards: MSME Business Award — Bengal Chamber of Commerce & Industry
Leading SME of India — Dun & Bradstreet (self-reported, 2014)
personal_brand_statement: I like fixing the unglamorous parts of a business — dispatch, stock, service calls — and I've spent twenty years doing exactly that across IT, telecom and field operations.
